name: Consumer Complaint Petition (Defective Goods/Services)
description: A formal complaint form addressed to a consumer protection agency or small claims court regarding defective products or poor services.
content:
TO THE {{agency_name}}

COMPLAINANT (Consumer):
Full Name: {{consumer_name}}
ID / SSN: {{consumer_id}}
Address: {{consumer_address}}
Phone: {{consumer_phone}}

RESPONDENT (Seller / Provider):
Company Name: {{seller_name}}
Address: {{seller_address}}

SUBJECT OF COMPLAINT: {{complaint_summary}}

CLAIM AMOUNT / DISPUTE VALUE: {{claim_amount}}

DATE OF INCIDENT / PURCHASE: {{formatDate incident_date}}

STATEMENT OF FACTS:

{{detailed_explanation}}

LEGAL EVIDENCE: Invoice/Receipt, Sales Contract, Warranty Certificate, Service Records, {{additional_evidence}}.

RELIEF SOUGHT: For the reasons explained above, due to the defective nature of the product/service, I respectfully request {{#if (eq relief_sought 'Full Refund')}}a full refund of the purchase price.{{else if (eq relief_sought 'Replacement')}}a replacement of the defective item with a new, defect-free equivalent.{{else}}a free-of-charge repair of the defective item.{{/if}}

Date: {{formatDate petition_date}}

Complainant Name: {{consumer_name}}



Signature: _________________________

ENCLOSURES:
1. Copy of Invoice/Receipt
2. {{attachments_list}}

fields.name: agency_name
fields.label: Name of Agency / Court
fields.placeholder: e.g., Consumer Protection Agency, Small Claims Court

fields.name: detailed_explanation
fields.label: Detailed Explanation of the Issue
fields.placeholder: Explain when you bought it, what went wrong, and how the company responded.
